// // This module calculates the complement of the sum of A, B, and CIN
module top_module(
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  CIN ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB ,
    output COUT,
    output SUM 
);assign SUM = (A ^ B) ^ CIN;
    assign COUT = (A & B) | (CIN & (A ^ B));

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the complement of the sum of A, B, and CIN
